consent.heading: Before We Begin
consent.title: Consent & Privacy
consent.intro: Your privacy and safety are our priority. Please take a moment to review the information below , it explains how we protect your data during the pilot.
consent.terms_text: By participating in this pilot program, you agree to use UpSpeech in accordance with its intended purpose as a speech therapy support tool. Your usage data may be collected in anonymized form to improve the platform. You may withdraw from the pilot at any time by contacting your administrator.
consent.privacy_text: UpSpeech collects audio recordings, exercise data, and usage analytics to provide speech therapy services. Your data is stored securely, encrypted at rest and in transit. Your recordings are processed for speech analysis and clinical report generation, which involves trusted third-party AI providers (ElevenLabs for transcription and Google's Gemini for report generation) acting only on our instructions. We never sell your data, and we don't share it for any other purpose without your explicit consent. Your recordings are only used to train AI models if you separately opt in.
consent.required_hint: Please complete this step to continue

media.heading: Camera & Microphone
media.title: Set Up Your Devices
media.description: UpSpeech needs access to your microphone and camera for speech exercises and practice sessions. Let's make sure they work.
media.speak_now: Speak to see the audio level

dashboard.exercise_content: This is your daily exercise. Start here each day to keep building your skills.
dashboard.stats_content: Track your completion rate, streaks, and more. Watch these numbers grow as you practice.
dashboard.weekly_content: See how you're doing compared to last week. Consistency is key!
dashboard.upcoming_content: Your next exercises from your therapist are listed here.
dashboard.nav_journey_content: Follow your therapy journey step by step. Each milestone brings you closer to your goals.
dashboard.nav_exercises_content: Find your assignments, practice sessions, and history here.

journey.progress_content: This is your personalized journey. Each step builds on the last.
journey.current_step_content: This is where you are now. Tap to start working on it.
journey.indicators_content: Green means complete. Keep going to open the next steps!

exercise.list_content: Your therapist assigns exercises here for you to complete.
exercise.card_content: Click any exercise to see the details and start practicing.
exercise.filters_content: Filter by status to find what needs your attention.

practice.library_content: Choose from these exercises to practice anytime you want.
practice.button_content: Hit the practice button to start a recording session.
practice.scenarios_content: Try conversation scenarios for realistic practice situations.

dashboard.stats_content: Your practice at a glance: patients, reports, and exercise activity.
dashboard.activity_content: Recent recordings and activity from your patients appear here.
dashboard.bubble_chart_content: Spot engagement patterns across your patients at a glance.
dashboard.nav_patients_content: Manage your patients, send invitations, and view their progress.
dashboard.nav_reports_content: Generate AI-assisted clinical reports from session recordings.
dashboard.nav_exercises_content: Browse exercise libraries and assign exercises to your patients.

invite.button_content: Click here to invite your first patient by email.
invite.list_content: Your patients will appear here once they accept the invitation.

report.recording_content: Upload or select a recording from a therapy session.
report.generate_content: AI will draft the clinical report for you to review and edit.

assign.row_content: Click a patient to open their profile and manage their learning path.

library.grid_content: Browse all available exercises organized by category.
library.card_content: Click to preview an exercise or assign it to a patient.
library.filters_content: Filter by type or search to find the right exercise quickly.

dashboard.stats_content: Active clients, total users, failed recordings, and pending invites at a glance.
dashboard.actions_content: Jump to Users, Analytics, Settings, or Reports from here.
dashboard.users_content: New users who recently joined your organization.
dashboard.activity_content: Recent platform activity, including any failed recordings that need attention.
dashboard.workload_content: See how patients are distributed across your therapists.

users.list_content: All users across your organization are listed here.
users.roles_content: See each user's role and account status at a glance.
users.actions_content: Edit roles, deactivate users, or send new invitations.

settings.org_content: Your organization's name and basic information.
settings.sections_content: Configure features and preferences for your organization.

analytics.dashboard_content: Platform-wide usage and engagement data to help you understand how your team uses UpSpeech.

recording_controls.title: Recording Controls
recording_controls.description: Use these controls to record your practice session. You can pause, resume, and add annotations as you practice.
